capabilities.name: Survey builder
capabilities.verify: survey_templates table (questions jsonb) + template UI in SurveysPage.tsx
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing — no template CRUD skill; create_survey_campaign only references an existing template_id.

capabilities.name: Multiple question types
capabilities.verify: survey_templates.kind check: nps/csat/ces/custom; PublicSurveyPage renders nps/csat
capabilities.notes: Limited type set and no skill surface; custom question rendering is thin.

capabilities.name: Public survey links
capabilities.verify: send_survey skill issues unique one-click token links; PublicSurveyPage.tsx renders them

capabilities.name: Scoring
capabilities.verify: min_score/max_score/category (detractor/passive/promoter) filters on list_survey_responses; scores in SurveysPage
capabilities.notes: NPS/CSAT category scoring only — no quiz/point scoring like Odoo's.

capabilities.name: Response analytics
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing — get_nps_score is in the module inputSchema but has no SkillSeed.

capabilities.name: Event-triggered sends (order.delivered, ticket.closed, ...)
capabilities.verify: create_survey_campaign trigger enum + delay_hours; Trigger UI in SurveysPage.tsx
capabilities.notes: Added: platform-event-driven survey dispatch with detractor auto-routing to FlowPilot.
